SoundSpaceReverbType.Wiki: The reverb type to use when on this collision.

SoundSpaceDelayType.Wiki: The delay type to use when on this collision.

FilterID.Wiki: The fltparam ID to apply whne ont his collision.

HitFilterID.Wiki: The hit filter to apply for this collision.

AmbientSfxAttachType.Wiki: The ambient SFX attachment type within this collision.

DisableInvasion.Wiki: Whether to disable invasions when on this collision.

AmbientSfxID.Wiki: The ambient SFX ID for this collision.

PlayerLightSfxID.Wiki: The player light SFX ID for this collision.

PlayAreaID.Wiki: The play area ID for this collision.

EnemyWallMemoryBlockID_A.AltName: Enemy Wall: Memory Block ID - A

EnemyWallMemoryBlockID_B.AltName: Enemy Wall: Memory Block ID - B

MapNameID.Wiki: The ID of tpf in menu\tex\icon\mapname to use for area name banner.\n\nID is also interpreted for mapname FMG for load game menu text (ID example: 102510 = FMG 10250001).

DelayMapNameDisplay.Wiki: Whether to delay the display of the map name when this collision is entered.

CubeEnvID.Wiki: The ID of tpf in model\map\envbnd to use for cubemaps.

CameraExFollowParamID.Wiki: The CameraExFollowParam parameters to use when this collision is stepped on.

HitGroupID.Wiki: Shared identifier. Checked by ESD HitGroup commands.
